zh.lifeSummary: 當David Childe於1540年出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾阿梅沙安時，他的父親Robert Childe29歲，母親Margaret Mylles20歲。他於1560年11月15日與Letitia Randall在英國巴金哈姆爾哈爾方特 聖 彼得結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1609年12月在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾法爾納姆 羅雅爾享年69歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾阿梅沙安。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当David Childe于1540年出生在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾阿梅沙安时，他的父亲Robert Childe29岁，母亲Margaret Mylles20岁。他于1560年11月15日与Letitia Randall在英国巴金哈姆爾哈爾方特 聖 彼得结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1609年12月在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾法爾納姆 羅雅爾享年69岁，埋葬在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾阿梅沙安。

nameMeanings.name: Childe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Child
meanings: nickname from Middle English child ‘child, infant’ (Old English cild), in various possible applications. The word is found in Old English as a byname, and in Middle English as a widely used affectionate term of address. It was also used as a term of status for a young man of noble birth, although the exact meaning is not clear; in the 13th and 14th centuries it was a technical term used of a young noble awaiting elevation to the knighthood. In other cases it may have been applied as a byname to a youth considerably younger than his brothers or to one who was a minor on the death of his father.
in Kent, possibly a topographic name from Old English cielde ‘spring (water)’, a rare word derived from c(e)ald ‘cold’.

nameMeanings.name: David
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the greatest of all the kings of Israel, whose history is recounted with great vividness in the first and second books of Samuel and elsewhere. As a boy he killed the giant Philistine Goliath with his slingshot. As king of Judah, and later of all Israel, he expanded the power of the Israelites and established the security of their kingdom. He was also noted as a poet, many of the Psalms being attributed to him. The Hebrew derivation of the name is uncertain; it is said by some to represent a nursery word meaning ‘darling’. It is a very popular Jewish name, but is almost equally common among Gentiles in the English-speaking world. It is particularly common in Wales and Scotland, having been borne by the patron saint of Wales (  see  Dewi   ) and by two medieval kings of Scotland.

en.lifeSummary: When David Childe was born in 1540, in Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert Childe, was 29 and his mother, Margaret Mylles, was 20. He married Letitia Randall on 15 November 1560, in Chalfont St Peter, Buckinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died in December 1609, in Farnham Royal, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 69, and was buried in Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque David Childe est né en 1540, à Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Childe, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Margaret Mylles, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Letitia Randall le 15 novembre 1560, à Chalfont St Peter, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en décembre 1609, à Farnham Royal, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als David Childe 1540 in Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Childe 29 und seine Mutter Margaret Mylles 20. Er hat am 15. November 1560 in Chalfont St Peter, Buckinghamshire, England Letitia Randall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb im Dezember 1609 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Farnham Royal, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Letitia Randall il 15 novembre 1560, nel Chalfont St Peter, Buckinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: David Childeが1540年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアエイメルシャムで生まれた時，父Robert Childeは29歳，母Margaret Myllesは20歳であった。1560年11月15日にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアチャルフォント スト ペターでLetitia Randallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1609年12月にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアファルンハム ロイアルで69歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアエイメルシャムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: David Childe(이)가 1540년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 어머샤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Childe(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Mylles(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1560년 11월 15일 영국 벅잉함실르 차폰트 스트 피터에서 Letitia Randall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1609년 12월 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 패른함 로야에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 어머샤에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Letitia Randall em 15 de novembro de 1560, em Chalfont St Peter, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда David Childe родился в 1540 г. в местности амиршам, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert Childe было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Mylles, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Letitia Randall 15 ноября 1560 г. в местности халфонт ст питир, буккингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер декабрь 1609 г. в местности фарнам рояль, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности амиршам, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.
